data.title: feat: document all binaries/scripts into CLAUDE.md
data.description:
Inventory all binaries/scripts/executables in the environment and make them discoverable via [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>) routing.

## Acceptance criteria

* All binaries/scripts/executables documented in `bin/CLAUDE.md`
* Each script has: purpose, usage, arguments

## Context

Currently `bin/healthcheck` and the context scripts are documented. The environment likely has more executables (gptodo, wt, gita, skogai, skogcli, argc) that should be surfaced.
